original_statement: how many times did he compete in australia?
mutated_statement: how many times did he do something in some place?
mutation_analysis: Action generalization + Location generalization: Specific action verb "compete" replaced by vague "do something" | Specific place "Australia" replaced by vague "some place" (compete→do something | Australia→some place)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据tree_and_critic的critique指出“问题是模糊的……未指定‘some place’”，以及after_refine的judge_thought明确写道“问题太模糊……无法确定”，可见agent在反思后认识到歧义并在最终step给出“Cannot be determined”。具体表现为：最初agent错误地猜测并给出具体答案（3），但在收到critic后修正策略，承认缺少关键信息并拒绝给出数值答案。因为最终行为是明确指出模糊性并不提供具体计数，符合“意识到目标模糊，反问用户/要求澄清”的分类。
